name: Nashville Fried Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Add yeast to warm water (1/2 cup).
2. Mix in other ingredients and let the dough rise.
3. Work into biscuits and drop into hot fat.
4. The recipe will make about six dozen biscuits. They can be frozen and stored.
5. When working them up, don't let them rise too much.
6. The fat should be slightly higher than 350°F. If the fat is too hot, the biscuits will be soggy in the center.
